statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(n:OCITenancy{ocid: $OCI_TENANCY_ID}) WHERE n.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH n LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE (n)
MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[r:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{ocid: $OCI_TENANCY_ID}) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE (r)
